baseline.observed: API output_path: Some("  ") was not validated before other scan option checks, while the CLI rejects empty --output values.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because run_scan did not return the expected empty-output-path error.

selected_candidate.name: API empty output path validation
selected_candidate.reason: Align run_scan output path validation with CLI required-value safety and avoid blank path filesystem behavior.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Blank output_path values return an error before source validation, export conflict validation remains green, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
The new guard runs before export conflict and source validation.
Focused API output path tests were rerun.
Focused CLI required-value parser test was rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
